theories.name: Pure gravity (no gauge forces)
theories.reason: No forces beyond gravity → no atoms → no chemistry → no observers

theories.name: U(1) only — pure QED
theories.reason: No nuclei → no atoms beyond hydrogen → no chemistry → no observers

theories.name: SU(2)×U(1) — no QCD
theories.reason: No confinement → no protons/neutrons → no atoms → no chemistry → no observers

theories.name: SU(3)×U(1) — no weak interaction
theories.reason: No beta decay → no stellar nucleosynthesis → no heavy elements → no observers

theories.name: SU(3)×SU(2) — no electromagnetism
theories.reason: No long-range force → no atoms → no chemistry → no observers

theories.name: SU(5) GUT
theories.reason: Reduces to SM at low energies; also produces observers

theories.name: SM + hidden U(1) sector
theories.reason: Includes SM → produces observers; hidden sector is extra

theories.name: SO(10) GUT
theories.reason: Reduces to SM at low energies
